afflictions.id: A Note on on strike/move bonus effect chnace
Each creature has a fixed luck stat 1-10 that does not increase on level up.
Chance of a status affliction being inflicted, or any other bonus effect occuring, is the base chance x luck multiplyier
for example, a unit with 10 luck using a tech with a bonus effect that has a 30% chnace to activate would be 3.3 x 0.3 = 99%
After calulating this value, the defending creature luck mitigates the chance
so if the unit from the previous example used the move that now has a 99% chnace to occur on a unit with 10 luck,
Note: If a unit would use an ability with a luck-based chance to apply a positive effct on an ally (ex: many sonic and avian techs), receiver does not use their luck stat to mitigate the chance
